journeys.name: New-patient comprehensive oral evaluation
journeys.failedStep: Status-collapse (Gap #1/#2): slideout exposes no distinct Existing (0) / Existing-Other (0) status controls. A new-patient exam cannot chart pre-existing-vs-elsewhere work, so the goal state (two records with DISTINCT status values) is unreachable.

journeys.name: Periodic recall exam (D0120)
journeys.failedStep: Status-collapse (Gap #1) prevents a watch→diagnosed transition that is distinct from the prior visit record, and the D0120 recall note is local React state with no DB column (P0-004) — confirmed by independent read: GET /dental/visits/unknown/notes → null (no note persisted). Prior baseline was: null…

journeys.name: Periodontal charting linked to odontogram
journeys.failedStep: No dedicated periodontal capture surface found in the workspace route (no perio/probing affordance in the rendered DOM). Gap #7 confirmed: the journey cannot complete through the UI — no shortcut taken.

journeys.name: Revenue chain (flagship)
journeys.failedStep: P0-001: two-step Mark-Done PATCH#1=no-resp (), PATCH#2=no-resp (). Independent read: anyPerformed=false, hasInvoice=false. Revenue chain dead end-to-end.

journeys.name: Status integrity on the odontogram
journeys.failedStep: Status-collapse (Gap #1/#2): slideout lacks distinct status controls for: existing[- ]other. Distinct enumerated statuses (Existing ≠ Existing-Other ≠ TP ≠ Condition) are unreachable, and Completed depends on the dead revenue chain (P0-001).

journeys.name: Multi-visit / phased treatment plan sequencing
journeys.failedStep: Treatment Plan tab exposes no phase/sequence/priority assignment controls (Gap #14). Phased sequencing cannot be expressed through the UI; the goal state (persisted phase/sequence fields) is unreachable. No out-of-order warning surface either.

journeys.name: Charting granularity & mixed dentition
journeys.failedStep: Independent read shows no persisted MOD surface set (surfacesPicked=3). Either the chart write did not persist or surface granularity is lost (Gap #9). Provisional PASS flips to BROKEN.

journeys.name: Informed refusal
journeys.failedStep: Treatment Plan tab exposes no decline/refusal control with a reason field (Gap #11). Informed refusal cannot be captured through the UI — legally-critical C4 requirement unmet. Goal state (persisted declined status + reason) unreachable.

journeys.name: Treatment-plan versioning
journeys.failedStep: Treatment Plan tab exposes no acceptance-capture or version-history control (Gap #6). An accepted plan cannot be frozen as an immutable versioned snapshot through the UI; the goal state (version N frozen, N+1 with the edit) is unreachable.

journeys.name: Void / amend a signed entry
journeys.failedStep: P0-004 CONFIRMED: notes are local React state with no DB column. Independent read of /dental/visits/unknown/notes → null shows no signed/locked persisted note (hasSignedPersisted=false); UI addendum control present=false. No signed/locked persistence ⇒ no addendum model ⇒ no audit trail for note mutations. The void/amend journey cannot complete through the UI (Gap #3 hard-delete, Gap #5 editable signed notes).

journeys.name: Free-tier ceph gate
journeys.failedStep: Ceph analysis returned 200 — the seeded demo org has a PAID imaging tier, so the free-tier gate (CIMG-001/002) cannot be exercised with the seeded dentist identity. A dedicated free-tier seed member is required to verify this journey (DONE_WITH_CONCERNS for the runner).

journeys.name: Landmark placement → SNA/SNB numeric
journeys.failedStep: NUMERIC mismatch — UI→API→math seam drifted from golden. Got SNA=NaN (exp 82), SNB=NaN (exp 80), ANB=NaN (exp 2), convexity=NaN (exp >0). If landmarks were placed via lossy canvas-click mapping this is the confirmed break.

journeys.name: Locked landmark immutability
journeys.failedStep: Locked landmark S unchanged server-side but the UI palette button is NOT disabled (silent-divergence risk — UI does not visibly prevent the edit).

journeys.name: Report gate + immutable versioned snapshot
journeys.failedStep: Report snapshot integrity failed: numericFrozen=false (SNA=78.5 exp 82, SNB=84.59 exp 80), byteIdentical=true. CIMG-006/008 not satisfied.
